# Method 9: Iteration at Scale

## What It Is

Continuous optimization of deployed solutions using real-world data and user feedback.

## Purpose

Maintain user-centered improvements at scale. Balance business metrics with user experience.

## Actions

- Monitor adoption, performance, and satisfaction
- Ship small, safe improvements
- Validate changes against personas
- Measure business impact continuously

## Success Criteria

- Sustained adoption and engagement
- No experience degradation
- Business impact measured

## Example

- **Manufacturing:** A/B tested voice-command phrasing variants; adopted highest-accuracy option across shifts

## Available Coaching & Analysis

Continuous Improvement Planner — `/improve-plan`
